# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - users

  - name: orders-service
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - orders

  - name: inventory-service
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - inventory

  - name: payments-service
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 80
    protocol: http
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    tags:
      - production
      - microservice
      - payments

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: users-v1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-v2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: orders-a.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-b.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: inventory-a.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-b.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 3
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
            - 504
    targets:
      - target: payments-a.internal:8443
        weight: 100
      - target: payments-b.internal:8443
        weight: 100

routes:
  - name: users-route
    service: users-service
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - PATCH
      - DELETE
      - OPTIONS
    hosts:
      - api.example.com
    paths:
      - /users
      - /profiles
    strip_path: false
    preserve_host: false
    regex_priority: 100
    https_redirect_status_code: 426
    request_buffering: true
    response_buffering: true
    tags:
      - production
      - users

  - name: orders-route
    service: orders-service
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - PATCH
      - DELETE
      - OPTIONS
    hosts:
      - api.example.com
    paths:
      - /orders
    strip_path: false
    preserve_host: false
    regex_priority: 100
    https_redirect_status_code: 426
    request_buffering: true
    response_buffering: true
    tags:
      - production
      - orders

  - name: inventory-route
    service: inventory-service
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - PATCH
      - DELETE
      - OPTIONS
    hosts:
      - api.example.com
    paths:
      - /inventory
      - /stock
    strip_path: false
    preserve_host: false
    regex_priority: 100
    https_redirect_status_code: 426
    request_buffering: true
    response_buffering: true
    tags:
      - production
      - inventory

  - name: payments-route
    service: payments-service
    protocols:
      - http
      - https
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - PATCH
      - DELETE
      - OPTIONS
    hosts:
      - api.example.com
    paths:
      - /payments
    strip_path: false
    preserve_host: false
    regex_priority: 100
    https_redirect_status_code: 426
    request_buffering: true
    response_buffering: true
    tags:
      - production
      - payments

plugins:
  - name: correlation-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Correlation-ID
      generator: uuid#counter
      echo_downstream: true

  - name: prometheus

  - name: request-size-limiting
    config:
      allowed_payload_size: 10
      size_unit: megabytes
      require_content_length: false

  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Frame-Options:DENY"
          - "X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff"
          - "Referrer-Policy:no-referrer"
          - "X-XSS-Protection:1; mode=block"

  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-ID
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Correlation-ID
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    route: users-route
    config:
      minute: 300
      hour: 10000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    route: orders-route
    config:
      minute: 200
      hour: 5000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    route: inventory-route
    config:
      minute: 500
      hour: 20000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    route: payments-route
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 2000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

  - name: key-auth
    route: payments-route
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: acl
    route: payments-route
    config:
      allow:
        - payments-clients
        - internal-services
      hide_groups_header: true

consumers:
  - username: payment-client-1
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: prod-payment-client-1-secret-key
    acls:
      - group: payments-clients

  - username: internal-billing-service
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: prod-internal-billing-secret-key
    acls:
      - group: internal-services
